blocks.text: Carlsen Opens His World Championship Challenger Campaign

Tuesday is a quiet but meaningful day for Norwegian sport. Magnus Carlsen steps into the FIDE Candidates Tournament, the gruelling road back to a World Chess Championship match. Every move counts from move one.
♟️ Carlsen opens Round 1 at FIDE Candidates 2026 — the challenger crown is on the line from the very first game
🚴 Dwars door Vlaanderen — Wærenskjold races Belgium's punchy warm-up ahead of Ronde van Vlaanderen Sunday
